title: Bodies of Last 2 Missing Italian Divers Recovered in the Maldives
summary_full: Experts have spent days conducting a complex search operation to find five divers who died on a trip to explore deep underwater caves in the Indian Ocean last week.
summary_public: Experts have spent days conducting a complex search operation to find five divers who died on a trip to explore deep underwater caves in the Indian Ocean last week.
